name: @graph-olap/documentation
description: Graph OLAP Platform documentation site (Starlight, replaces MkDocs per ADR-141)

scripts.postbuild: bash -c 'if [ -z "$SKIP_OFFLINE_POSTBUILD" ]; then python3 tools/offline-pagefind.py && python3 tools/offline-fixup.py; else echo "offline postbuild skipped (SKIP_OFFLINE_POSTBUILD=$SKIP_OFFLINE_POSTBUILD)"; fi'
